from zipfile import ZipFile
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]')
with ZipFile(p) as z:
    data = z.read('xl/worksheets/sheet2.xml').decode('utf-8')
    print('COUNTIF(I11:I14,\"fail\")' in data)
PY

python3 build_artifacts.py && python3 - <<'PY'
from zipfile import ZipFile
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]')
with ZipFile(p) as z:
    data = z.read('xl/worksheets/sheet2.xml').decode('utf-8')
    print('COUNTIF(I11:I14,\"fail\")' in data)
PY
raw_step.observation: Build succeeded and produced artifacts, then unzip-based inspection confirmed workbook parts and key formulas existed. A later inspection found a row-offset issue in the Calc summary formulas, counting I11:I14 instead of the actual data rows I12:I15.
raw_step.output: Workbook zip contained xl/workbook.xml, xl/styles.xml, and four sheet XML parts. The summary formulas used the wrong row range, which required a follow-up patch.

input:
python3 build_artifacts.py && python3 - <<'PY'
from zipfile import ZipFile
from pathlib import Path
p = Path('[EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]')
with ZipFile(p) as z:
    s2 = z.read('xl/worksheets/sheet2.xml').decode('utf-8')
    print('COUNTIF(I12:I15,\"fail\")' in s2, 'A11:K15' in s2)
PY
sed -n '1,240p' [EXCLUDED_GENERATED_ARTIFACT]
sed -n '1,200p' actual_outputs.json
label: positive
